title: hieracium cacuminum
intro: Hieracium cacuminum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The medicinal properties of Hieracium cacuminum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of consuming Hieracium cacuminum are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium cacuminum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used as a tea or added to salves and ointments for topical application.
